name: BlueSky
title: Greatttt ❤
review: This app is extremely useful for people who are bored of traditional studying patterns because it offers various functions to learn English as well as helping you gain more knowledge of different academic aspects. Therefore, I think it should be paid for and it's worth the money.

name: Closetoyou
title: Totally recommended for learners️
review: This app has saved my time finding learning materials. I have always wanted to practice listening to English conversations, reading news, reading books, and learning new vocabulary. Surprisingly, its service meets all of my demands for learning by offering a great deal of tutorial English videos.

name: Hukd1984
title: Useful for studying English anytime, anywhere️
review: Easy to study English via many channels such as news, blog, video. I can save new words to my account for revision. Love it with many thanks.

name: Rosie208
title: Great app️
review: I think it's a great app to improve your listening, reading skills and you can expand your vocabulary. Additionally, they have a lot of games, so I'd like to recommend it to all the English learners out there.️

name: Sunni
title: Feedback after using app️
review: I am Vietnamese. I am learning English from this app. I wanna show my highly appreciation for this app because it has many courses to learn which help me improve all four skills of my English. I want to thank whoever created this app. :heart:

name: Chanhokie
title: Excellent app️
review: To be honest, this is one of the apps that really deserves to be rated 10 stars. You can improve all your skills in English with this app.

name: Tina Thanh Tam
title: So good️
review: Such an amazing English app! Really enjoy using it to further my knowledge. I am super grateful to the creators!
